problem_solved: UK healthcare and social services operate in silos, making it difficult to coordinate care and track outcomes across the NHS and local authorities
solution_description: UK-based population health and social care platform. Provides integrated care coordination across NHS, local authorities, and voluntary sector. Includes social determinants screening, care planning, and outcome tracking. Supports integrated care systems (ICS) in England
traction_signals: Outcome tracking across health and social care
notes: UK SDOH and integrated care platform. High Varden fit - addresses SDOH coordination in NHS context. Important for UK market expansion. Supports NHS move toward integrated care systems
